auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Ticketmaster developer API key used as the apikey query parameter for Discovery and Partner APIs, and as the apikey header for Season Ticketing.

actions.name: execute_season_ticketing_command
actions.description: Execute a Ticketmaster Season Ticketing command.

product.description: The Season Ticketing product path segment.

cookies.description: Cookie values to send while polling.

pollDelayMs.description: Delay between polling attempts in milliseconds.

inputSchema.description: Input for executing a Ticketmaster Season Ticketing command.

queued.description: Whether the command is still queued upstream.

cookies.description: Cookies returned by the upstream API.

anyOf.description: A raw Ticketmaster object returned by the upstream API.

raw.description: A raw Ticketmaster object returned by the upstream API.

raw.description: A raw Ticketmaster object returned by the upstream API.

attractions.description: The attractions returned by the search.

size.description: The number of items returned in the current page.

totalElements.description: The total number of items available.

totalPages.description: The total number of pages available.

links.description: A raw Ticketmaster object returned by the upstream API.
